A '''battle''' took place on [[Togoria/Legends|Togoria]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==The battle==
The battle began with the arrival of [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy]] forces under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]]' command, which attacked the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] small [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]]. [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces under General [[Waldan Bridger]] arrived to assist in repelling the invaders, only to discover that [[Togoria/Legends|Togoria]] and its inhabitants had voluntarily defected to the CIS. Bridger's forces were slaughtered by the native [[Togorian/Legends|Togorians]] while Bridger himself perished in a duel with Grievous that lasted less than twenty seconds.

==Behind the scenes==
In the novel ''[[The Paradise Snare]]'', it was written that Togoria didn't have their own [[Starship/Legends|ships]] as of [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]], yet Grievous is said to have attacked small Togorian shipyards in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], during Clone Wars.
